title: Null Move Test-Positions
text: Home * Engine Testing * Test-Positions * Null Move Test-Positions Test-positions where Null Move may fail due to zugzwang : 8/8/p1p5/1p5p/1P5p/8/PPP2K1p/4R1rk w - - 0 1 bm Rf1; id "zugzwang.001"; 1q1k4/2Rr4/8/2Q3K1/8/8/8/8 w - - 0 1 bm Kh6; id "zugzwang.002"; 7k/5K2/5P1p/3p4/6P1/3p4/8/8 w - - 0 1 bm g5; id "zugzwang.003"; 8/6B1/p5p1/Pp4kp/1P5r/5P1Q/4q1PK/8 w - - 0 32 bm Qxh4; id "zugzwang.004"; 8/8/1p1r1k2/p1pPN1p1/P3KnP1/1P6/8/3R4 b - - 0 1 bm Nxd5; id "zugzwang.005"; See also [ edit ] Null Move Pruning Test Results Forum Posts [ edit ] It is a nullmove killer (zugzwang) by Rémi Coulom , CCC , November 05, 1999 Crafty-IsiChess,CCT4,r11 ==> A move to avoid? by José Antônio Fabiano Mendes , CCC , January 29, 2002 endgame position - null move problem by Jon Dart , CCC , February 06, 2003 to Tim Foden: zugzwang positions by Jaime Benito de Valle Ruiz , CCC , February 07, 2004 static mate/stalemate detection? by Alexandru Mosoi , CCC , November 21, 2015 Up one level
